calibration_notes.dynamic_structure: stylized stable 3-state benchmark consistent with Phase 0/1 specification
calibration_notes.shock_scales: inflation and output-gap shock scales anchored to Phase 2 SVAR residual standard deviations
calibration_notes.targets: inflation target and neutral rate both set to 2.0 as baseline
calibration_notes.status: initial benchmark calibration for Phase 3; may be refined before final thesis draft
